Nothing now is impossible!
No. 3 The sudden weather changes all this last fa
and this winter especially have caused a "flu" & a chest
condition that lasts much longer and weakens those pe
much more than ever the oldfashioned "flu" did, so I'
been told by the doctor to whom I go.
Hence it has put the vast majority of peopl
a weakened condition, receptive of attack of a greater phy
illness, something that may even be breathed from the
air & may put us into a helpless, weak or sleeping cond
that will give Russia a chance to walk in and take this
country intact, without ever bombing & spoiling our
rich oil and industrial supplies! (Russia has never y
gotten the oil she started out for.) If done in this mann
we would wake up or come to and find ourself possibly
slaves!
Its something to think about, and as I see it a
very great possibility! so I'm praying that you place
matter with those or one you are certain will give it a
very serious thot. If my theory is a true case, then i
we could locate that base, we could save a great de
of trouble to our nation. The above mentioned matter ti
in with what I wrote before World War II to general chief of s
Marshall, President F.D.R. and Mertain Dyes. about a s
seemingly fantastic dream I had three years or about th
after the first world war. In that dream which I had 3
nights alike to the smallest detail and in succession. In
that dream the Russians, Germans, and a slant eyed pe
came in the S. West & marched & [unclear]
